serverInfo.name: tanhdev-com
serverInfo.title: tanhdev.com — Go Architecture & Distributed Systems
serverInfo.description: Technical blog by Lê Tuấn Anh (Independent Consultant) — Go backend architecture, microservices, distributed systems, AI engineering, Magento platform migration, and Kubernetes/GitOps. 17+ years production experience. Real case studies from high-traffic e-commerce platforms (25M+ req/month, 8K RPS).

tools.name: search_posts
tools.description: Search blog posts by topic keyword. Returns matching posts on Go, microservices, Magento, Kubernetes, AI engineering.

tools.name: get_series
tools.description: Browse long-form technical deep-dive series. Available: Shopee Architecture, Alipay Double-11, Core Banking, Ride-Hailing, MCP Engineering, AI-Driven Engineer, and more.

tools.name: get_tech_radar
tools.description: Get the latest Tech Radar entries — weekly curated signals on Go ecosystem, Kubernetes, AI tooling, and distributed systems.

tools.name: get_hire_info
tools.description: Architecture consulting and advisory services — Go microservices, Magento migration, distributed systems design.
